title: AI Recipe Generation Success
description: Verify successful generation of creative V1 recipes with rich textual descriptions including emojis.

steps.description: Log in as a valid user.
Navigate to AI Kitchen recipe generation section.
Input valid parameters for recipe generation.
Trigger AI recipe generation.
Verify that recipe text is generated and contains rich descriptions and emojis.
Verify no error messages are displayed.

title: AI Recipe Generation Failure Handling
description: Verify system behaviour when AI recipe generation service fails or returns error.

steps.description: Simulate AI generation service failure or timeout.
Attempt to generate a new recipe in AI Kitchen.
Verify user receives appropriate error notification.
Verify no partial or corrupted recipe content is displayed.

title: Successful Conversion from V1 Recipe to V2 Tech Card
description: Verify accurate transformation of a V1 AI-generated recipe into structured V2 tech card with cost, nutrition, and product mapping.

steps.description: Create or select a valid AI-generated V1 recipe.
Initiate conversion process to V2 tech card.
Verify tech card contains detailed ingredient list with cost calculation.
Verify nutrition values for calories, proteins, fats, and carbs are calculated per 100g and per serving.
Verify ingredient SKUs are linked using product catalog integration.

title: Manual and Automated SKU Mapping Accuracy
description: Validate automatic SKU mapping with fuzzy matching and fallback mechanisms and manual override capability.

steps.description: Select a V2 tech card with unmapped or partially mapped ingredients.
Run automated SKU mapping function.
Verify fuzzy matching correctly maps most ingredients.
Verify fallback article codes are generated for unmatched items.
Manually override SKU mapping for at least one ingredient.
Verify manual mapping is persisted and overrides automated suggestions.

title: IIKO RMS Product Catalog Synchronization
description: Validate product catalog import, article allocation, and SKU sync with IIKO RMS integration.

steps.description: Initiate product catalog synchronization with IIKO RMS.
Verify product catalog data is imported correctly into the system.
Verify article codes are allocated and linked with internal SKUs.
Confirm SKU mappings in tech cards reflect the updated catalog.

title: Nutrition Calculation Accuracy
description: Verify nutrition calculator computes KBJU values accurately per 100g and per portion based on ingredient and quantity data.

steps.description: Create or use a V2 tech card with multiple ingredients and defined serving sizes.
Trigger nutrition calculation.
Verify calorie, protein, fat, and carbohydrate values match expected standard calculations.
Check values are presented both per 100g and per serving.

title: Tech Card Export in Multiple Formats
description: Verify tech cards export correctly into XLSX, CSV, PDF, and ZIP archive formats compatible with IIKO imports.

steps.description: Select a finalized V2 tech card.
Export tech card in XLSX format.
Verify XLSX file is generated and data integrity is maintained.
Export tech card in CSV format.
Verify generated CSV file meets required specifications.
Export tech card as PDF.
Confirm PDF contains all key tech card information properly formatted.
Export multiple tech cards as ZIP archive.
Verify ZIP contains all selected export formats and files are accessible.

title: Preflight Export Compliance Checks
description: Ensure preflight export checks detect unmapped ingredients and prevent export until issues are resolved.

steps.description: Select a V2 tech card with unmapped or incorrectly mapped ingredients.
Attempt to export the tech card.
Verify export dialog blocks export and prompts user to resolve mapping issues.
Correct mapping issues manually.
Retry export.
Verify export completes successfully after all issues resolved.

title: User Authentication and Session Isolation
description: Validate SHA1 hash-based login system and session token management to enforce strict user data isolation.

steps.description: Attempt login with correct username and password.
Verify successful authentication and issuance of session token.
Access user-specific dashboard and verify data isolation.
Attempt to access another user's data using crafted API requests.
Verify access is denied and security constraints enforced.
Attempt login with invalid credentials.
Verify login failure and no session token issued.

title: Subscription and PRO Feature Access Gating
description: Verify that PRO features like advanced AI tools and food pairing are enabled only for subscribed users with valid pro status.

steps.description: Login as a free-tier user.
Attempt to access PRO AI tools and features.
Verify access is denied or features are disabled.
Login as a subscribed PRO user.
Access PRO AI tools and features.
Verify full access to all PRO features is granted.

title: Feature Flags Toggle Functionality
description: Validate dynamic enabling/disabling of experimental and PRO features via feature flags according to user role and subscription status.

steps.description: Log in as administrator.
Enable or disable a feature flag e.g. new tech card version or HACCP compliance.
Log in as a standard user.
Verify feature availability reflects updated feature flag state.
Test toggling feature flags for PRO user vs. free user.
Verify feature access or restrictions applied per flag and subscription.

title: User History and Navigation Persistence
description: Verify that user history of recipes and tech cards is persisted accurately with working UI navigation controls.

steps.description: Create several AI recipes and convert them into tech cards.
Navigate through recipe and tech card history using UI controls.
Verify history entries persist after logout and re-login.
Ensure navigation returns correct historical data with proper state management.

title: Responsive UI Behavior on Mobile and Desktop
description: Test frontend UI responsiveness, modals, forms, progress bars, and feedback messages across devices.

steps.description: Access the application from a desktop browser.
Verify layout is proper, forms are usable, modals appear correctly, and feedback is visible.
Access the application from a mobile device or emulated viewport.
Verify UI elements adapt properly for small screens and remain functional.
Trigger various UI workflows including recipe generation, editing, export dialogs.
Validate UI responsiveness and no layout breaking occurs in any state.

title: Backend and Frontend Logging Verification
description: Ensure critical events such as AI generation timing, export operations, and error messages are logged correctly for troubleshooting.

steps.description: Perform AI recipe generation.
Export tech cards.
Trigger invalid operations to cause errors.
Verify logs contain entries for AI generation time, export status, and error details.

title: Export File Data Integrity Check
description: Verify that all exported formats (XLSX, CSV, PDF, ZIP) maintain correct data integrity and are compatible for IIKO RMS import.

steps.description: Export a tech card in each supported format.
Inspect generated files for correct formatting and completeness.
Verify no data truncation, formatting errors, or structural anomalies exist.
Confirm files can be imported successfully into IIKO RMS test environment.
